description_long: This is a stylized female doll with long, flowing pastel pink hair that extends well past the waist, featuring subtle gradients into darker pink and purple at the tips. The doll wears a simple, sleeveless white dress with a fitted bodice and a flared skirt, cinched at the waist with a pink belt. Her shoes are high-heeled and lavender in color, adorned with prominent bow decorations at the ankles. The facial features are delicate and anime-inspired, with large eyes and a small mouth, giving the doll a gentle, neutral expression. The arms are extended outward in a T-pose, and the legs are straight, with the feet close together. The overall appearance is clean, smooth, and highly polished, with a soft, semi-glossy finish typical of collectible or display dolls.
description: A pastel pink-haired female doll in a white dress and lavender high heels with bows, featuring a smooth, polished finish and anime-inspired facial features.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full length and layered gradient of the long pink hair, as well as the back of the white dress and lavender shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the flowing hair extending behind, and the side silhouette of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's facial features, outstretched arms, fitted dress, and decorative bows on the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hair's volume and the side profile of the dress and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Sleeveless white dress with a flared skirt and pink waist belt, paired with lavender high-heeled shoes featuring large bows; the style is reminiscent of modern anime or J-fashion influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed mouth, large open eyes, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Very long, straight pastel pink hair with layered ends and subtle gradient to darker pink and purple, parted in the center and flowing freely down the back.
